channel.title: 简报 Jae Daily · 2026年07月09日
channel.description: 国际政治 · 宏观财经 · 前沿科技 · AI 辅助分析

item.title: [未译] Oil Soars as US Extends Strikes Against Iran Into Second Night
item.description: Oil jumped to a two-week high amid renewed US attacks on Iran and President Donald Trump’s assessment that the interim peace deal is a dead letter, heightening concerns about the free flow of crude fr

item.title: [未译] Outcry as Meta lets users make AI images from public Instagram profile pics
item.description: The tech giant said people can opt out - but privacy campaigners called it a "recipe for disaster".

item.title: [未译] a software engineering interview question I like: computing the median
item.description: <p><a href="https://lobste.rs/s/8kxouk/software_engineering_interview">Comments</a></p>

item.title: [未译] South Korea’s hottest new bachelors are chip workers
item.description: Baek, a 35-year-old manager at the South Korean semiconductor titan SK Hynix, was enrolled in Sunoo, a matchmaking company based in Seoul, a year ago. In a move typical of anxious South Korean parents

item.title: [未译] Eight killed after landslide hits girls' school in Bangladesh
item.description: Rescuers pull bodies from the mud after heavy monsoon rains batter the south-eastern coast.

item.title: [未译] Harley-Davidson’s Credit Ratings Get Cut to Junk By S&P
item.description: S&P Global Ratings cut Harley-Davidson Inc.’s credit grades to junk status on Wednesday, citing the company’s strategy to start selling lower-cost motorcycles to boost revenue.

item.title: [未译] World Cup spurs Mexican-Americans to reconnect: ‘Putting on the Mexican jersey this time took on a different meaning’
item.description: Mexico’s historic run has inspired millions of migrants and their descendants to seek out and rebuild their roots with their country of origin

item.title: [未译] SK Hynix US Offering Is More Than Seven Times Oversubscribed
item.description: SK Hynix Inc.’s US listing is more than seven times oversubscribed, according to people familiar with the matter, as the South Korean memory chipmaker prepares to price its offering Thursday.

item.title: [未译] Fmr. HUD Secretary on Toyota’s Texas Shift, Mexico Trade
item.description: Henry Cisneros, former US Department of Housing and Urban Development Secretary and former Mayor of San Antonio, discussed the origins and significance of Toyota's investment in San Antonio. He recoun

item.title: [未译] 【今朝の5本】仕事を始める前に読んでおきたい厳選ニュース
item.description: ​威嚇強める、FOMC議事要旨、テック起債、BofA姿勢転換、世界成長見通し

item.title: [未译] Online marketplaces still selling dozens of unsafe baby products, Which? finds
item.description: Pillows, sleeping bags and feeders subject to safety notices were found on sites including Amazon and TikTok.

item.title: [未译] Zelensky on Moscow trip: 'it's difficult, a lot of Ukrainian drones in the air'
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky, responding to a question from U.S. President Donald Trump about whether he would travel to Moscow for talks, joked that there were too many Ukrainian drones the

item.title: [未译] Fed officials were split on direction of interest rates at last meeting, minutes show
item.description: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released minutes from its June 16-17 meeting.

item.title: [未译] Virgin Media fined after hanging up on customers trying to cancel contracts
item.description: Millions of phone calls from customers were "likely mishandled" over nearly a three-year period, the regulator says.

item.title: [未译] From mouthwash to hair dye: How weight-loss jabs are changing shopping habits
item.description: The BBC looks at how spending habits have shifted as users report feeling less hungry.

item.title: [未译] Trains and emergency calls affected after major outage at Australia's largest telecoms company
item.description: Servers at data centres in Sydney and Melbourne were to blame but the exact cause remains unknown.

item.title: [未译] Australia dock workers call for 28-hour week in AI talks
item.description: A union says workers are "in the crosshairs" of automation as AI is being tested across ports.

item.title: [未译] Arizona toddler found alive in hospital morgue after declared dead from drowning
item.description: After he was discovered to still be alive, the 18-month-old was flown to another hospital and survived.

item.title: [未译] Hundreds of jobs at risk as John Lewis plans to cut some services
item.description: No final decision has been made but the job cuts will happen in the autumn if the redundancy plans are approved.

item.title: [未译] Victims of 23andMe data breach to get $47m payout, judge rules
item.description: 23andMe compiles genetic profiles of people through DNA testing kits, but it was heavily criticised after a 2023 hack.

item.title: [未译] German doctor jailed for murder of 15 patients and suspected of more
item.description: The German palliative care doctor has been sentenced to life imprisonment for killing 15 of his patients.

item.title: [未译] If Microsoft sold off Xbox, who would even buy it?
item.description: This week, Microsoft took a huge ax to its Xbox business. The company announced that it would be laying off 1,600 workers now, 1,600 more over the next fiscal year, and t

item.title: [未译] The foundational elements of AI architecture that IT leaders need to scale
item.description: With the rapid progress of AI capabilities and the move to agentic systems, organizations are expanding their use cases as the technology continues to grow. That constant evolution also introduces ris

item.title: [未译] What will define Elon Musk’s legacy? Doge cuts to USAID Ebola programs
item.description: Experts say cuts have hindered the response to DRC’s Ebola outbreak and resulted in ‘significant numbers’ of deathsElon Musk has an Ebola problem. SpaceX stock dropped precipitously after its initial

item.title: [未译] US-China scientific decoupling: the hidden costs of geopolitical rivalry
item.description: As the United States marks the 250th anniversary of its founding, it confronts a new world order dominated by its relationship with China. In this wide-ranging series, we examine the pressure points a

item.title: [未译] US hearing weighs higher tariffs over alleged forced labour, targeting China
item.description: China’s labour practices came under scrutiny on Wednesday during a US government hearing on a proposal to impose tariffs on goods linked to forced labour, with participants divided over whether higher

item.title: [未译] William D. Zabel, High-Flying Lawyer and Civil Rights Champion, Dies at 89
item.description: He brokered celebrity divorces and recovered billions for victims of Bernie Madoff’s Ponzi scheme. But he was proudest of helping to legalize interracial marriage.

item.title: [未译] Feds demand autonomous vehicle companies stop interfering with first responders
item.description: The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration said emergency scenes are not "edge cases."

item.title: [未译] Levi Strauss beats quarterly expectations, raises guidance and dividend
item.description: Levi Strauss beat quarterly expectations on the top and bottom lines during its fiscal 2026 second quarter.

item.title: [未译] Google’s deepfake detector system used to debunk McConnell hoax pic
item.description: Earlier this week, a picture seemed to show Kentucky Senator Mitch McConnell covered in tubes in a hospital bed in a state of extreme distress. It turned out to be an AI-generated fake.
